label: eliza-1-2b
notes:
Single-GPU bf16 serve from the base eliza-1-2b repo. Args mirror serve_vllm.py --gpu-target single (no weight quant, no KV quant — leaves vLLM autopick).

WORKER CONTRACT: this manifest serves vLLM on port 8000. Use the sibling `onstart-vllm.sh` (declared via `onstart_script`); it launches `vllm serve` from this manifest's `vllm_args`, tails for `Application startup complete`, and execs the upstream pyworker (`worker.py`) with LLAMA_SERVER_PORT=$VLLM_PORT so the heartbeat contract still works. The upstream pyworker `onstart.sh` (llama-server / port 8080) is NOT compatible with this manifest. The GGUF/llama-server path under ../ollama/ remains available for direct upstream pyworker use.
